faq.question: What is Hostinger best for?
faq.answer: Hostinger is best for ad testing and fast creative production.

faq.question: How much does Hostinger cost?
faq.answer: Review the current Hostinger pricing page because plan names, limits, and promotions can change.

faq.question: Is Hostinger good for teams?
faq.answer: Yes, Hostinger can work for teams when its collaboration, governance, and pricing fit the workflow.

faq.question: What are the main Hostinger limitations?
faq.answer: The main limitations are reflected in the cons section and should be weighed against your use case.

faq.question: How does Hostinger compare with alternatives?
faq.answer: Hostinger should be compared on pricing, core features, ease of use, integrations, and support.

faq.question: Does Hostinger have a free plan?
faq.answer: Check the official Hostinger site for current free-plan availability and usage limits.

faq.question: Who should avoid Hostinger?
faq.answer: Skip Hostinger if the not-for section describes your needs better than the best-for section.

faq.question: How long does Hostinger take to set up?
faq.answer: Most readers can evaluate Hostinger quickly, but full rollout depends on team size and integrations.

faq.question: Can beginners use Hostinger?
faq.answer: Yes, beginners can start with the basics and expand into advanced workflows over time.

faq.question: What should I check before buying Hostinger?
faq.answer: Confirm pricing, required features, integrations, data policies, and support expectations before buying.

faq.question: Is Hostinger worth it in 2026?
faq.answer: For the right audience, Hostinger is worth shortlisting in 2026.

faq.question: Where can I try Hostinger?
faq.answer: Use the review button or official website to try Hostinger directly.

whyTrust.title: Affiliate disclosure first
whyTrust.description: Buttons may earn a commission, but the review includes both benefits and limitations so readers can decide confidently.

whyTrust.title: Conversion-focused criteria
whyTrust.description: The page evaluates speed, ease of use, pricing clarity, output quality, and practical fit for common marketing workflows.

whyTrust.title: Easy to update
whyTrust.description: All claims live in JSON so you can refresh pricing, screenshots, FAQs, and affiliate links without rewriting code.

notFor.title: Pixel-perfect designers
notFor.description: If you need complete manual control over every layer, a traditional design suite may be a better fit.

notFor.title: No ad testing budget
notFor.description: The biggest value appears when you can test multiple creatives across paid or organic channels.

notFor.title: Set-and-forget users
notFor.description: AI drafts still benefit from human review, brand checks, and performance-based iteration.
